prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 semi-realistic anime-style illustration of a goth/alt young woman lounging in a bright high-rise apartment by tall floor-to-ceiling windows, with a sunny blue sky, fluffy clouds, and a distant city skyline outside. The woman has long wet-looking black hair, very detailed but not overly frizzy strands, pale skin, and her face intentionally covered by a soft rectangular blur/censor block. She wears a black crop camisole with a small white cross-like emblem, loose black cargo pants, a black belt with a silver buckle and dangling chain, a black choker with a small pendant, multiple ear piercings, black nail polish, and an oversized black puffer jacket slipping off her shoulders. Her pose is relaxed and slightly reclined on a white couch, one knee raised close to the camera, one hand resting near a small round table. Add a large intricate black tattoo sleeve on her visible upper arm. The room is sunlit with strong natural light, soft shadows, and crisp highlights. Include exactly 6 notable background/foreground objects: 1 large wall poster reading “DON’T OVERTHINK SHIT.” with tiny text below, 1 small pink-purple neon heart sign on the wall, 2 small square photo prints below the neon sign, 1 black Monster Energy can on the table, and 1 smartphone with a black-and-purple graphic case on the table. Add large green plant leaves entering from the upper right. Use a stylish Japanese digital-art look, high-detail fabric folds, glossy hair, clean linework, realistic lighting, and a cool urban bedroom atmosphere. Keep the composition cropped like a candid fashion portrait, no watermark, no extra characters, no extra text beyond the poster and tiny wall details.
